seo.title: Pool Accessories & Extras | Maxima Pools - Columbus, OH
seo.description: Premium pool accessories and extras: heating, LED lighting, water features, auto covers, fire bowls, and recreation. Professional in-house installation in Columbus, OH.
seo.ogDescription: Elevate your pool with premium accessories — heating, lighting, water features, fire bowls, and more. All installed in-house by Maxima Pools.

hero.subtitle: Elevate your pool experience with premium accessories — heating, lighting, water features, fire bowls, and more. All professionally installed in-house.

catalogSection.intro: From essential equipment to luxury enhancements — we supply and install it all.

showcaseSection.intro: Click a category to see what's available and how it can transform your pool.

showcase.label: Heating
showcase.title: Pool Heating Systems
showcase.description: Extend your swim season from early spring through late fall with professional heating solutions. Gas heaters deliver rapid temperature control, while energy-efficient heat pumps can both warm and cool your pool.
features: Gas heaters for rapid temperature rise

showcase.label: Lighting
showcase.title: LED Lighting Solutions
showcase.description: Transform your pool into a mesmerizing nighttime oasis. Color-changing LED systems create stunning ambiance, while deck lighting ensures safety and adds a sophisticated glow to your outdoor space.

showcase.label: Water Features
showcase.title: Water Features & Aesthetics
showcase.description: Elevate your backyard with the soothing sounds and stunning visuals of custom water features. From cascading waterfalls to elegant deck jets and tanning ledge bubblers — create your personal resort.

showcase.label: Covers & Safety
showcase.title: Automatic Pool Covers
showcase.description: One-touch protection that keeps your pool safe, clean, and warm. Automatic covers prevent unsupervised access, reduce chemical evaporation by up to 70%, and retain heat overnight — all with the press of a button.

showcase.label: Fire Features
showcase.title: Fire Bowls & Fire Features
showcase.description: Add a dramatic contrast of fire and water to your poolscape. Gas-powered fire bowls create dancing flames that reflect off the water surface, turning your backyard into an unforgettable entertainment destination.

showcase.label: Recreation
showcase.title: Recreation & Fun
showcase.description: Make your pool the ultimate destination for family fun. From diving boards and slides to basketball hoops and volleyball nets — we professionally install every recreation feature with proper safety clearances.

automationSection.paragraph: Manage lights, heaters, water features, pumps, filtration, and chemical dosing — all from your phone. Monitor water temperature and chemistry in real-time from anywhere.

automation.title: Remote Control
automation.description: Manage your entire pool system from your phone — anywhere, anytime.

automation.title: Temperature Control
automation.description: Set, schedule, and monitor water temperature with precision.

automation.title: Lighting Scenes
automation.description: Create and save custom light programs for any mood or occasion.

automation.title: Filtration Management
automation.description: Automate pump cycles, chemical dosing, and water flow scheduling.

automation.title: Real-Time Monitoring
automation.description: Track water chemistry, equipment status, and energy usage live.

automation.title: Energy Savings
automation.description: Smart scheduling reduces energy consumption by up to 30%.

whyProSection.paragraph: Unlike other pool companies that outsource specialized work, Maxima Pools handles every installation in-house. One team, one vision, one flawless result.
whyProSection.imageAlt: Professional pool lighting installation by Maxima Pools

whyPro.title: In-House Expertise
whyPro.description: Unlike other companies that outsource, Maxima Pools handles every single installation in-house with trained technicians.

whyPro.title: Seamless Integration
whyPro.description: Accessories are integrated during pool construction for a flawless finish — no retrofitting, no compromises.

whyPro.title: Warranty Protected
whyPro.description: Professional installation ensures manufacturer warranties stay valid and your investment is fully protected.

whyPro.title: One Team, One Timeline
whyPro.description: Everything is coordinated by a single team — pool, accessories, and finishes — so nothing falls through the cracks.

integration.paragraph: When you choose Maxima Pools, every accessory is seamlessly integrated during construction — not bolted on as an afterthought. The result is a cleaner finish, better performance, and zero headaches.

cta.paragraph: Tell us what you envision and we'll make it happen. One team, one timeline, one stunning result.
